title: sorbus aria proles mougeotii
intro: Sorbus aria proles mougeotii, also known as Whitebeam, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Whitebeam include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
